Necessity to follow Astrologer's Advice
Misery follows greediness. Under such situations, every
man needs guidance. Astrologer is one of the guides to help such
men. When an Astrologer guides a native, and the native follows
it, shunning his stubbornness and complexes, the native will have
a smooth life.
Ex. A person was travelling by an over loaded bus, after
some distance, the Driver of a bus corning from the opposite
direction stopped the bus and informed of the RID check being
